name: Luli 12" Wall Sconce - SCN3005 - Walnut/Black - Safavieh
description:
Transform your living space with the LULI 12 inch walnut and black sconce. Designed to infuse warmth and character, this wall sconce offers a stunning blend of mango wood and iron, making it a captivating addition to any decor. The walnut finish adds depth, while the black accents provide a sleek contrast, creating a balance between rustic charm and contemporary style.

Whether you wish to illuminate a hallway or create ambient lighting in your living room, the LULI sconce is versatile enough to fit most settings. Its compact 12 inch design ensures it complements various sizes of rooms without overpowering the existing decor.

Crafted from mango wood and iron, this sconce brings a touch of nature indoors while maintaining a modern aesthetic. The materials are chosen for their ability to add unique texture and charm to your home. Create an inviting atmosphere and elevate your space with this thoughtfully designed piece. Consider adding the LULI sconce to provide ambiance and style to your home.
